pr.title: 11L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA: 1.1453 BPB

output.summary: Int6 QAT with per-dimension SmearGate, SWA checkpoints, and high Muon weight decay keeps an 11-layer, 512-dim model quantization-friendly for the 16MB constraint.
techniques: Per-dimension SmearGate blending current and prior token embeddings
SWA over final half of training to smooth weights for quantization
High Muon weight decay plus int6 QAT with fp16 tied embeddings
